result:
30/30 tests pass. I added the six missing v2 commands to `src/minigit.ps1`:

- **status** — prints staged files or `(none)`
- **diff** — parses both commit file sections, reports Added/Removed/Modified per file
- **checkout** — restores blobs to working directory, updates HEAD, clears index
- **reset** — moves HEAD, clears index, leaves working directory untouched
- **rm** — removes a filename from the index, errors if not present
- **show** — displays commit header plus indented file list
